rationale: User explicitly requested medium intensity. The content itself would warrant high intensity under auto analysis (48 claims, 7 institutional attributions, 8 statistical claims, 13 affected groups, 6 high-sensitivity domains including law enforcement credibility and cyber violence, 19 emotional hooks, and multiple polarization axes). However, per protocol, when the user specifies a non-auto intensity, that choice is respected directly. Medium intensity will deploy 3 panels with 3 issues each and 2 deliberation rounds, providing substantive but focused review across the key dimensions of this case.
